mapper.select: SELECT 'PM' AS user_type , '嫄닿컯?댁옄' AS group_name , PM.platform_manager_code AS manager_code , sf_user_name(user_id) AS manager_name , PM.mobile AS mobile , PM.telephone AS telephone , PM.email AS email , PM.sales AS sales , PM.admin AS admin , PM.executive AS excutive , PM.outsales AS outsales , 0 AS result , 0 AS contract , 0 AS account , 0 AS reserve , PM.user_id , PM.no_use FROM platform_manager PM WHERE PM.deleted_at IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'CM' AS user_type , CP.company_name AS group_name , CM.company_manager_code AS manager_code , sf_user_name(user_id) AS manager_name , CM.mobile AS mobile , CM.telephone AS telephone , CM.email AS email , 0 AS sales , 0 AS admin , 0 AS excutive , 0 AS outsales , CM.result AS result , CM.contract AS contract , CM.account AS account , 0 AS reserve , CM.user_id , CM.no_use FROM company_manager CM LEFT JOIN company CP ON CM.company_id = CP.company_id AND CP.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE CM.deleted_at IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'HM' AS user_type , hospital_center_view.hospital_center_name AS group_name , HM.center_manager_code AS manager_code , sf_user_name(user_id) AS manager_name , HM.mobile AS mobile , HM.telephone AS telephone , HM.email AS email , 0 AS sales , 0 AS admin , 0 AS excutive , 0 AS outsales , 0 AS result , 0 AS contract , 0 AS account , 0 AS reserve , HM.user_id , HM.no_use FROM center_manager HM LEFT JOIN center C ON HM.center_id = C.center_id AND C.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN hospital H ON C.hospital_id = H.hospital_id AND H.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN hospital_center_view ON hospital_center_view.center_id = HM.center_id WHERE HM.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT HM.user_id , H.hospital_id , HM.center_id , HM.center_manager_code , HM.center_manager_name , HM.no_use , HM.email , HM.telephone , HM.mobile , HM.notes , HM.notok_urge FROM center_manager HM LEFT JOIN user U ON HM.user_id = U.user_id LEFT JOIN center HC ON HC.center_id = HM.center_id LEFT JOIN hospital H ON H.hospital_id = HC.hospital_id WHERE HM.deleted_at is NULL AND U.deleted_at is NULL AND U.user_type = 'HM' AND HM.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT U.user_id , PM.platform_manager_code , PM.platform_manager_name , PM.no_use , PM.sales , PM.admin , PM.executive , PM.outsales , PM.email , PM.telephone , PM.mobile , PM.notes FROM user U LEFT JOIN platform_manager PM ON PM.user_id = U.user_id WHERE PM.deleted_at is NULL AND U.deleted_at is NULL AND U.user_type = 'PM' AND U.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT U.user_id , CM.company_id , CM.company_manager_code , CM.company_manager_name , CM.no_use , CM.contract , CM.result , CM.account , CM.email , CM.telephone , CM.mobile , CM.notes FROM user U LEFT JOIN company_manager CM ON CM.user_id = U.user_id WHERE CM.deleted_at is NULL AND U.deleted_at is NULL AND U.user_type = 'CM' AND U.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT C.company_name , CMC.contract , CMC.reserve , CMC.result , CMC.center_manager_company_id , CMC.company_id , CC.checkup_year FROM center_manager_company CMC INNER JOIN company C ON C.company_id = CMC.company_id INNER JOIN center_manager HM ON HM.user_id = CMC.user_id INNER JOIN center HC ON HC.center_id = HM.center_id INNER JOIN company_checkup CC ON C.company_id = CC.company_id AND CC.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE CMC.deleted_at is NULL AND C.deleted_at is NULL AND HM.deleted_at is NULL AND HC.deleted_at is NULL AND HM.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT HM.user_id , HM.center_id , hospital_center_view.center_name , hospital_center_view.hospital_name , hospital_center_view.hospital_center_name AS groupName FROM center_manager HM JOIN hospital_center_view ON hospital_center_view.center_id = HM.center_id WHERE HM.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO center_manager_company ( user_id , company_id , contract , reserve , result , created_user_id , updated_user_id) VALUES ( #{userId} , #{companyId} , #{contract} , #{reserve} , #{result} , #{sessionUserId} , #{sessionUserId}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE contract = VALUES(contract) , reserve = VALUES(reserve) , result = VALUES(result) , created_at = NOW() , created_user_id = VALUES(created_user_id) , updated_at = NOW() , updated_user_id = VALUES(updated_user_id) , deleted_at = NULL , deleted_user_id = NULL
SELECT center_manager_company_id FROM center_manager_company WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND company_id = #{companyId}
